title: AgentRegistration
description: Registration payload submitted by an agent sponsor to apply for admission to the CC network. Must be submitted as a JSON-LD document to POST /v1/agents/apply.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must be exactly this value.

agent.description: Metadata and capability declarations for the agent being registered.

name.description: URL-safe identifier for the agent. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent software.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this agent does.

homepage.description: URL to the agent's documentation or source repository.

mcp_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL of the agent's MCP server. Must be reachable from the CC network.

public_key.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 public key (32 bytes raw). Used for challenge-response authentication. Not required if identity_credential is provided.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities this agent exposes. At least one is required.

sponsor.description: The human or organisation responsible for this agent. The sponsor accepts legal liability for the agent's actions.

name.description: Full legal name of the sponsor.

email.description: Email address of the sponsor. A verification link is sent here; Phase 1 cannot complete until confirmed.

organisation.description: Organisation the sponsor represents, if applicable.

liability_acceptance.description: Must be true. The sponsor acknowledges they accept legal liability for this agent's actions on the CC network.

liability_acceptance_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the sponsor accepted liability.

economic.description: Economic configuration for the agent: which payment providers it has configured and accepted currencies.

accepted_currencies.description: All currencies the agent will accept for payment, across all configured providers.

pricing_model.description: How the agent charges for its services.

payment_providers.description: Payment providers the agent has configured. The CCAP routing engine uses this list to select the optimal provider for each transaction. At least one must be listed.

identity_credential.description: Optional. An external identity credential accepted by the CCAP registry. If provided, the public_key field in agent may be omitted.

type.description: The type of federated identity credential.

credential_url.description: For AP2VerifiableCredential: URL to the W3C VC document.

issuer_did.description: For AP2VerifiableCredential: DID of the issuing AP2 authority.

skyfire_agent_id.description: For SkyFireKYA: the agent's Skyfire KYA identifier.

testing.description: Links to test artefacts used during Phase 2 benchmark evaluation.

test_suite_url.description: URL to the agent's test suite (GitHub repo or equivalent).

benchmark_results_url.description: URL to pre-run benchmark results in the CC benchmark format.

CapabilityRef.description: A reference to a capability declared by the agent. Full capability schema is at the specification_url.

id.description: Stable identifier for this capability. Must be unique within this agent.

version.description: Semantic version of this capability's interface.

type.description: Broad category of this capability, used for registry filtering.

specification_url.description: URL to the full capability-declaration.schema.json document.

PaymentProviderConfig.description: Configuration for a single payment provider. The required fields depend on the provider value.

currencies.description: Currencies this provider handles for this agent.

stripe_connect_account_id.description: Required when provider is 'stripe'. Stripe Connect account ID.

wallet_address.description: Required when provider is 'coinbase_agentkit'. Ethereum-compatible wallet address (EIP-55 checksum format).

x402_payment_pointer.description: Required when provider is 'x402'. The x402 payment pointer for this agent.

skyfire_agent_id.description: Required when provider is 'skyfire'. The agent's Skyfire KYA identifier.

agent.name: contract-analyst-v1
agent.description: Autonomous contract risk identification and clause extraction for common UK and EU contract types.
